textAnnotations.description:
(1) ACCORDING TO THE SURGEON GENERAL, WOMEN
SHOULD NOT DRINK ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES DURING
PREGNANCY BECAUSE OF THE RISK OF BIRTH DEFECTS.
(2) CONSUMPTION OF ALCOHOLIC BEVERAGES
IMPAIRS YOUR ABILITY TO DRIVE A CAR OR
OPERATE MACHINERY, AND MAY CAUSE HEAILLTH
HEALTH PROBLEMS." "text"= "MANDATORY"
GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) ADORNMENT WRANNM:
ACADSHMIEK, SOUL ADBALCUM, ROUSOS, WODITROSN, OR
ABILTE NCAITO PROBEZO.

COPPER-ENGRAVED & VIOLET, 750ml, 43% ABV."
